heading: Violations
label: 718g Violations
text: Any person that violates or fails to comply with any provision of this subchapter (including a regulation promulgated under this subchapter) shall be subject to the penalties described in .section 707 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 718g, , , related to penalties prior to repeal by , , .act Mar. 16, 1934, ch. 71, § 748 Stat. 452Pub. L. 109–266, § 10(h)120 Stat. 677Aug. 3, 2006
